title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
